message:
feat(layout): add ResponsiveLayout for breakpoint-driven layout switching (bd-130l.3)

ResponsiveLayout maps Breakpoint tiers to Flex configurations with
auto-detection from area width. Includes transition detection, explicit
split, constraint count queries, and 18 tests.

Also adds Flex::constraint_count() accessor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
